ELF Header {
  Class: ELF64
  DataEncoding: LittleEndian
  Type: SharedObject (Shared object file)
  Machine: Advanced Micro Devices X86-64
}
VersionRequirements [
  Dependency {
    Version: 1
    FileName: libc.so.6
    Auxiliary {
      Name: GLIBC_2.17
    }
  }
  Dependency {
    Version: 1
    FileName: libgcc_s.so.1
    Auxiliary {
      Name: GCC_3.0
    }
  }
]
VersionDefinitions [
  Definition {
    Name: GLIBC_99.0
  }
]
